data.title: Investment firm buys 3,273 Bitcoin at $77,000 each for $255M, increasing total holdings to 818,334 BTC.
data.description: Acquiring 3,273 BTC for $255 million, Michael Saylor’s Strategy used MSTR stock sales to fund this purchase, expanding its total holdings to 818,334 BTC.

data.title: Harvey AI's legal AI expansion accelerates with new Dallas office, strengthening ties with Texas firms.
data.description: The expansion of Harvey AI with a new office in Dallas highlights the company's swift advancement in the field of legal artificial intelligence. The move is part of a strategic effort to strengthen connections with law firms and businesses in Texas. This development showcases the growth of Harvey AI in the legal sector and its commitment to expanding its presence in the region.

data.title: Intel and FPT Collaborate to Advance AI-Driven Autonomous Factories with Digital Manufacturing Platforms
data.description: In Richardson, Texas, Intel and FPT have partnered to merge Intel’s cutting-edge factory simulation and AI optimization tools with FPT’s digital manufacturing platforms. This collaboration aims to leverage Intel's expertise in AI and simulation with FPT’s digital manufacturing capabilities. This strategic alliance between the two companies is expected to enhance manufacturing processes and drive efficiency in the industry. Intel's advanced technologies in factory simulation and AI optimization will complement FPT’s digital manufacturing platforms, potentially revolutionizing the sector. This partnership signifies a significant development in the integration of AI technologies and digital manufacturing solutions, promising to bring innovation and enhanced performance to the industry.
Intel Corporation and FPT Corporation are collaborating on AI-enabled autonomous factory development through digital manufacturing platforms.

data.title: Foton Motor's Overseas Brand Day and 30th Anniversary Celebration Successfully Held in Beijing
data.description: FOTON Motor celebrated its inaugural FOTON BRAND DAY in Beijing on April 22, 2026. The event drew media and dealer representatives from Europe, the Americas, and Southeast Asia. Attendees enjoyed factory tours, product test drives, and commemorated the company's 30th anniversary.

data.title: $1.4B at risk as Bitcoin shorts face liquidation at $80K. Price squeeze to $80K looming, triggered by spot market demand?
data.description: Bitcoin attempted to surpass the $79,000 threshold but fell short. The situation may have created a bear trap as approximately $1.4 billion worth of short positions are on the line for liquidation once the price hits $80,000. The question remains whether the demand in the spot market will serve as the catalyst for this potential event.
